<svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M18 13v6a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H5a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V8a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h6"></path><polyline points="15 3 21 3 21 9"></polyline><line x1="10" y1="14" x2="21" y2="3"></line></svg>

ast.name: textContent
ast.source: Logically will use the files from your library to conduct research.
ast.target: 逻辑上将使用您库中的文件进行研究。

ast.name: textContent
ast.source: Ask me about your research, summarize papers, or explore topics.
ast.target: 询问我关于您的研究、总结论文或探索主题。

ast.name: textContent
ast.source: Sign in to access your AI research assistant powered by Logically.
ast.target: 登录以访问由Logically驱动的AI研究助手。

ast.name: textContent
ast.source:
Select vault notes to sync into your Logically library. They will be
        indexed for retrieval-augmented search.
ast.target: 选择要同步到Logically库的保险库笔记。它们将被\n        索引以用于检索增强搜索。

ast.name: textContent
ast.source:
Optional. Add instructions to guide tone, format, or assumptions for
            every message.
ast.target: 可选。添加指令以指导每条消息的语气、格式或假设。

ast.name: textContent
ast.source:
Sign in for full access \u2014 unlimited messages, file uploads, and
                more.
ast.target: 登录以获得完全访问权限——无限消息、文件上传等。

ast.name: textContent
ast.source: You're in visitor mode (3 messages/day). Sign in for full access.
ast.target: 您处于访客模式（每天3条消息）。登录以获得完全访问权限。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Display the icon in the left ribbon for quick access.
ast.target: 在左侧功能区显示图标以便快速访问。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: For advanced users: paste your token to log in directly. If you really need this, please reach out to our support team.
ast.target: 适用于高级用户：粘贴您的令牌以直接登录。如果您确实需要此功能，请联系我们的支持团队。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Test your connection to the API.

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Welcome! Your previous chat history has been cleared for privacy.
ast.target: 欢迎！为保护隐私，您之前的聊天记录已被清除。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Welcome back! You are now logged in.
ast.target: 欢迎回来！您现在已登录。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: ✓ Welcome back! You're now logged in.
ast.target: ✓ 欢迎回来！您现在已登录。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source:
\u{1F6A7} Google Sign-In is coming soon!

For now, you can:
\u2022 Sign in with email and password above
\u2022 Or use a login token (find this in Advanced settings)

Visit logically.app and go to your Account Detail to set up your password. Please reach out to our support team for additional help!
ast.target:
🚧 Google登录即将推出！

目前，您可以：
• 使用上方的邮箱和密码登录
• 或使用登录令牌（在高级设置中查找）

请访问 logically.app 并进入您的账户详情以设置密码。如需更多帮助，请联系我们的支持团队！

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: You've been logged out. You can sign back in anytime!
ast.target: 您已退出登录。您可以随时重新登录！

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
ast.target: 您的会话已过期。请重新登录。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Could not determine your library. Try signing in again.
ast.target: 无法确定您的库。请尝试重新登录。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No user message found to regenerate from
ast.target: 未找到可重新生成的用户消息。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No active note to insert into. Open a note first.
ast.target: 没有活动的笔记可供插入。请先打开一个笔记。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Failed to insert response into note

ast.name: content
ast.source:
**Combined search quota reached**

You've used your combined library + web + academic quota for this period. [Upgrade your plan](https://logically.app/pricing) to continue.
ast.target: **综合搜索配额已达上限**\n\n您已使用完本周期的综合库 + 网络 + 学术配额。[升级您的计划](https://logically.app/pricing)以继续使用。

ast.name: content
ast.source:
**Search pipeline error**

The research assistant encountered an internal error. Please try again.
ast.target: **搜索管道错误**\n\n研究助手遇到内部错误。请重试。

ast.name: content
ast.source:
**You've used your credits**

You've reached your credit limit for this period. Upgrade your plan to continue.
ast.target: **您已用完积分**\n\n您已达到本周期的积分上限。升级您的计划以继续使用。

ast.name: content
ast.source: Something went wrong. Please try again.
ast.target: 出现了一些问题。请重试。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Fast and efficient for basic research tasks
ast.target: 快速高效，适用于基础研究任务。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Compact GPT model for quick responses
ast.target: 紧凑型GPT模型，提供快速响应。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Fast Claude model for basic tasks
ast.target: 快速Claude模型，适用于基础任务。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Powerful model with large context window
ast.target: 强大的模型，拥有大上下文窗口。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Balanced Claude model for complex tasks
ast.target: 平衡型Claude模型，适用于复杂任务。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 针对复杂推理任务进行了优化。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 高级推理，具备逐步分析能力。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Configure your connection for AI-powered research assistance.
ast.target: 配置您的连接以获得AI驱动的研究辅助。

ast.name: title
ast.source: Get more monthly AI query credits
ast.target: 获取更多每月AI查询积分

ast.name: title
ast.source: Larger context windows for complex documents
ast.target: 更大的上下文窗口，适用于复杂文档。

ast.name: title
ast.source: GPT-5.4, Claude Opus 4.6, Gemini 3.1 Pro Preview
ast.target: GPT-5.4, Claude Opus 4.6, Gemini 3.1 Pro Preview
